title: Room
description: A specific physical room unit. References its room type for configuration. One file per room in rooms/.

id.description: Unique within the property. Typically the room number slug, e.g. room-101.

room_type_id.description: Must reference a valid room type id in room_types/.

name.description: Display name for the room, e.g. 'Room 101' or 'The Garden Suite'.

floor.description: Floor number. 0 = ground floor. Negative values for basement levels.

section.description: Free-form grouping label for this room, e.g. 'West Wing', 'Pool House', 'Garden Annexe'. When set, takes precedence over `floor` for grouping in the UI. Leave empty/unset to group by floor.

view.description: Specific view from this unit when rooms of the same type have different views.

accessible.description: Override the room type's accessible flag for this specific unit.

connecting_room_ids.description: IDs of rooms that connect directly to this one (for family bookings).

notes.description: Any unit-specific notes guests should be aware of.

photos.description: Unit-specific photos. Most photos should be on the room type.
